_meta.source: Scraped from moei.gov.ae public pages (Playwright). PDPL-safe. Re-run scripts/scrape_moei.py to refresh.

services.title: Sheikh Zayed Housing Programme — Reschedule a Housing Loan
services.title_ar: إعادة جدولة قرض الإسكان — برنامج الشيخ زايد للإسكان
services.audience: UAE nationals with an active SZHP loan
services.summary: Citizens facing genuine financial hardship can apply to extend the term of their housing loan. Agent42 triages eligibility via the rules engine and prepares the offer letter for e-signature.
channels: WhatsApp
